default_binding.GOAL: the sealed ledgers that could clear her name

slots.meaning: The lone investigator returning to the sealed building overnight.
slots.guidance: A single capable investigator with a personal stake in the building's secret; never armed with more than an incidental tool.

slots.meaning: The deceased relative whose fate the hero is trying to uncover the truth about.
slots.guidance: A named relative who died (or disappeared) at this institution; the emotional stakes of the whole search.

slots.meaning: The full proper name of the whole institution the story takes place inside, including its institution-type word.
slots.guidance: A place name plus its institution type (e.g. 'Blackwood Sanatorium', 'Kestrel Hollow Silo'); used both in full and, at a few points, as a bare short-form reference to the same place.

slots.meaning: The single point of entry and exit the hero uses at the start and on the abandon ending.
slots.guidance: A quiet, unguarded way in and out; always safe to reach.

slots.meaning: The roaming staff/security figure whose hourly round threatens capture, not harm.
slots.guidance: A single patrol figure who is never armed and never violent; being found by them means capture or a forced retreat, never injury.

slots.meaning: The time of day/event that ends the safe window for being inside.
slots.guidance: A survivable, fair-warning time pressure; being caught by it means a hurried retreat, never harm.

slots.meaning: The outside workforce/force whose imminent arrival is the story's ticking clock.
slots.guidance: A short noun for the outside crew/team due at the deadline; their arrival is the visible sign time has run out.

slots.meaning: The overarching prize: the records that would clear the kin's name, stated once at the outset.
slots.guidance: A plural-reading noun phrase for the records/proof being sought (e.g. records, documents, ledgers), so it agrees with the surrounding 'are somewhere inside'; a benign paper prize, never a weapon.

slots.meaning: The central hall every wing opens off of; the safe hub the hero returns to between wings.
slots.guidance: A single, always-safe central chamber; wonder/dread over toxic hazard.

slots.meaning: The identity of the first wing: a flooded stairwell leading up to a records tower.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.

slots.meaning: The identity of the second wing: a hydrotherapy hall over a flooded sub-basement.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.

slots.meaning: The identity of the third wing: the cold storage rooms and death register vault.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.

slots.meaning: The identity of the fourth wing: the deconsecrated chapel and its unmarked graves.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.

slots.meaning: The identity of the fifth wing: the boiler house and its service tunnels.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.

slots.meaning: The identity of the sixth wing: the superintendent's administrative wing.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.

slots.meaning: The identity of the seventh wing: the locked patient dormitories.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.

slots.meaning: The identity of the eighth wing: the controlled-drugs dispensary.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.

slots.meaning: The identity of the ninth wing: the attic wards under the roof.
slots.guidance: A short, evocative wing name; distinguishable from the other eight wings.
